sources.title: Single-cell RNA-seq reveals ectopic and aberrant lung-resident cell populations in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
sources.note: The GSE136831 atlas reports activated IPF myofibroblasts as a core stromal disease population.

sources.title: A small-molecule TNIK inhibitor targets fibrosis in preclinical and clinical models
sources.note: The TNIK IPF paper highlights myofibroblasts as a key TNIK-enriched cell state.

sources.title: Dysregulation of club cell biology in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
sources.note: SCGB1A1 and related club-cell markers are dysregulated in IPF and associated with MUC5B-positive club-cell biology.

sources.title: A small-molecule TNIK inhibitor targets fibrosis in preclinical and clinical models
sources.note: The TNIK IPF paper reports elevated TNIK expression in club cells.

sources.title: A small-molecule TNIK inhibitor targets fibrosis in preclinical and clinical models
sources.note: The TNIK IPF paper reports elevated TNIK expression in cytotoxic T cells.

sources.title: NKG7 is a stable marker of cytotoxicity across immune contexts
sources.note: NKG7, GNLY, PRF1, and related genes define cytotoxic lymphocyte programs.
